args.query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS matched_cases
FROM "Case"
WHERE COALESCE(orderitemid__c,'') ILIKE '%01tWt000006hVJdIAM%'
   OR COALESCE(subject,'') ILIKE '%01tWt000006hVJdIAM%'
   OR COALESCE(description,'') ILIKE '%01tWt000006hVJdIAM%';
